eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 6:15 PM on JUN 2, 2026 Effective until 2:15 AM JUN 3, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Phoenix Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Phoenix PD is looking for 70-year-old James Lyons Sr.  James was last seen on June 1st at 10:00 p.m. at his residence in the area of 43rd Avenue and Myrtle Avenue. James walks with the assistance of a red walker and was wearing a black shirt with jeans. James suffers from a medical condition that may cause him to appear confused and disoriented. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
